description:
Recto: Unidentified writings in Arabic script, maybe accounts or scribal practice.

Verso: Fragment of a legal deed of acknowledgment (iqrār), involving a debt. The beginnings of 9 lines are preserved, and it seems the draft was then abandoned (or at least unsigned). Mentions New Cairo.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
